rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF REBECA CHAVEZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #3, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. 1) The petition requests fees in the total amount of $9,171.25 for services of the conservator and its attorneys. The estate had cash of $30,441.78 as of the ending date of this account period, but according to the conservator's declaration, the estate cash has been spent down to qualify the conservatee for Medi-Cal benefits and is now less than $2,000. No installment payment plan or other conditions of the payment, if the requested fees are to be allowed as prayed, have been proposed by the conservator. 2) Should the Court withdraw the Public Guardian's authority as conservator to take fees on account, as set out in the February 18, 2016 Order? PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOSEPH ROBERT PICCININI
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/23/21 . (No earlier availability.) Issues necessitating continuance: Although the amendment was file stamped on 7/26/21, due to this Court's shortage of file clerks, it was not actually E-filed (scanned and available for viewing) until 8/12/21. Notice of the amendment and of the hearing on 8/11/21 was mailed on 7/23/21, before the amendment was actually filed. [LRSF 14.14 A.] Attorney costs still do not show full, itemized details: "Filing Fees" or "Court Service" without more is not a helpful description, especially when the dates do not correspond exactly with any filing dates. "Delivery" without a description of what was delivered is not very helpful. There was no filing fee of $660.00 or $216.50 or $446.50... If there was $6,577,344.95 in cash on hand as of 7/22/21, after payment of $3,508,914.08 to the devisee of the specific gift, $58,003 balance of attorney statutory fee, and $6,355.31 attorney costs (if fully supported), and setting aside a $30,000 reserve, the net amount of cash should $2,974,072.56, one-third of which should be $991,357.52, not $991,298.19. (The previously authorized partial fee was $54,997.00. The net amount of statutory fee, however, appears to be correct.) Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues (likely, a second amendment) must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 11/10/21. If the second amendment cannot be filed in time to give sufficient notice and the beneficiaries will not waive notice, Counsel should contact the assigned Examiner to request more time. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF HATTIE BARNES
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/1/21. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: The total disbursements shown on Schedule C is $82,522.97, not $82,528.10. The "detailed" schedules still are not detailed: they should have four columns showing the date, the source or payee, the description, and the amount. For example, "Community" or "CORT Furniture" or "Franklin Pharmacy" or "Eye Surgery", etc., without more is not sufficient. Probate Code Section 1063(h): If the conservator has knowledge of any real property of the conservatee located in a foreign jurisdiction, the conservator shall include an additional schedule that identifies the real property, provides a good faith estimate of the fair market value of the real property, and states what action, if any, will or has been taken to preserve and protect the real property, including a recommendation whether an ancillary proceeding is necessary to preserve and protect the real property. How does land in Arkansas from which income is being generated (even if minimal) not have any value? The liabilities schedule still does not show the amount advanced by the conservator, for which she might later seek reimbursement. The checking account statement ending 7/22/20 shows a balance of $11,555.34 , but no reconciliation is shown. [LRSF 14.35 D.] The value of cash is the same, whether it is the carry value or "market" value. Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 11/19/21. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF THELMA M. THOMPSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Finding A Private Fiduciary
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The attorney for the petitioner and proposed successor personal representative of this estate concurrently represents the resigning executor/conservator of the decedent's spouse, as well as the personal representative of the estate of the decedent's spouse. The conservator of the decedent's spouse continued to report 100% ownership of the Naples property as an asset of the conservatorship, even after opening this probate to recognize the decedent's 50% ownership of the Naples property. The Court has already ordered distribution of 100% ownership of the Naples property from the conservatorship estate of the decedent's spouse to the personal representative of the probate estate of the decedent's spouse. The attorney anticipates obtaining a "consent to multiple party representation" from her clients. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review the Court's 10th Amended General Order which took effect on 06/28/2021 for more information.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF JEREMIAS ZEULI
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/23/21. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: No proof of service of Notice of Filing of Corrected I&A has been filed yet. Original bank statements must be filed to verify the beginning balances (as well as the ending balances). [Probate Code Sect. 2620(c)(2).] (Check images for amounts disbursed during the accounting period are not adequate.) The accounting still does not have a schedule showing the market value of property on hand. [Prob. C. Sect. 1063(a).] No schedule showing the liabilities has been filed yet. The "detailed" schedules do NOT show the nature or purpose of each receipt or disbursement, the source of the receipt or name of the payee... Reimbursements to anyone, especially the conservator, must clearly indicate who the original payee was. The attorney fee declaration does not appear to meet the requirements of CRC 7.751(b) and 7.702. Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 11/10/21. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE WOON FUNG CHAN REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Instructions And Confirming Trust Asset
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/7/21. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: No proof of service of the amended petition has been filed yet. [CRC 7.53(a).] No copy of the purported pour-over will was attached to the amended petition. Please also file a copy of the 2001 deed that transferred the property out of the trust at the time of refinance and the 2012 deed of reconveyance. "Beneficiary" is not a relationship to the settlor. Prob. C. Sect. 850 succeeded Heggstad and sets higher standards for proving that assets not transferred to a trust during a trustor's life were, in fact, intended to be held in the trust. In other words, a beneficiary of the trust receives mailed notice with a copy of the petition, but any heir-at-law, who would stand to inherit, if the trust did not exist or were invalid, is a party whose right, title or interest would be affected by this petition, and, therefore, must receive (or waive) personal service of notice. [Prob. C. Sect. 17203(b) and CCP Sect. 413.10 et seq.] Who are the settlor's heirs-at-law? Any supplement to the amended petition must also be served on all interested parties, including via personal service to any heir who is not a beneficiary of the trust. [CRC 7.53(b).] Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 11/23/21. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RAN OEHL
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/1/21 (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: Item 5a(2) of the petition must be answered. This Court requires statements immediately preceding the date of death to be filed to verify how title to accounts/assets was held. Notice to a minor must be sent directly to a minor and also, separately, to the person having legal custody of the minor with whom the minor resides. [CRC 7.51(d).] It is unclear if the minor's interests are adequately represented. If the assets are not, in fact, community property, she would be entitled to one-half of any separate property. A guardian ad litem may be necessary to represent the minor's interests. The proof of service shows that notice was mailed on 9/30/21. The amended petition was not filed until 10/4/21 (and not actually scanned and viewable until 10/5/21). [LRSF 14.14 A.] Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 11/19/21. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.
